policy.title: Privacy Policy
policy.p0: This Privacy Policy sets out the terms under which Futureyou uses and protects the information provided by its users when using its website. We are committed to the security of our users' data.
policy.p1: Our website may collect personal information such as:
policy.p1l3: Academic data: Institution or place of study.
policy.p1l4: Security: Password (encrypted with hashing algorithms for protection).
policy.p2: Futureyou uses the information to provide the best possible service, particularly to:
policy.p2l1: Maintain a record of users and personalized profiles.
policy.p2l2: Process and personalize market recommendations based on the user's academic profile and answers.
policy.p2l3: Send notifications about service updates or relevant information requested by the user.
policy.p2l4: Ensure secure access to the platform via credential verification.
policy.p3: Futureyou is highly committed to keeping your information safe. We use the latest web security protocols and advanced encryption standards to ensure no unauthorized access occurs.
policy.p3note: Security note: Your password is stored irreversibly; no administrator of this site has access to your password in plain text.
policy.p4a: At any time you may restrict the collection or use of personal information provided to our website.
policy.p4b: You have the right to request access, rectification or definitive deletion of your data from our database.
policy.p4c: This company will not sell, transfer or distribute the personal information collected without your explicit consent, unless required by a judicial authority through a legal order.
policy.p5: This website may contain links to other sites of interest. Once you click on these links and leave our page, Futureyou no longer has control over the destination site. Therefore, we are not responsible for the privacy terms or data protection on those third-party sites.
policy.p6: We reserve the right to change the terms of this Privacy Policy at any time to adapt it to legislative, jurisprudential or market changes.
